summary: Completed comprehensive testing of United Hands Foundation iteration 5 features. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all requested changes: Royal Navy & Gold theme applied, updated contact details (phone: 9730267630, address: Ratnai Niwas), 'TA JI LATUR' removed from all pages, Transparency page cleaned up (only FCRA notice + Legal banner), Contact Us in navbar, dynamic social media icons in footer (Facebook link working), dynamic hero background from site_assets, project funds UI showing raised_amount correctly, Admin Settings has Social Media Links section with CRUD.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified working: 1) Royal Navy & Gold theme applied (dark navy bg #0B1F3A, gold accents #C6A15B visible). 2) Hero section shows dynamic background from site_assets API. 3) Navbar has 'Contact Us' link with phone icon. 4) Footer shows updated phone (+91 9730267630) and address (Ratnai Niwas, Kaikadi Chal, Bhoi Galli, Latur). 5) Footer does NOT contain 'TA JI LATUR'. 6) Footer shows dynamic social media icons - Facebook link present (https://www.facebook.com/share/g/17PHfXpM2Q/), Instagram/YouTube hidden when URLs empty. 7) About Us page does NOT contain 'TA JI Latur', shows updated address. 8) Transparency page cleaned up - NO document download cards, only FCRA Compliance Notice and Legally Registered NGO banner with PAN/80G/12A/Society Reg info. 9) PillarsOfImpact shows project progress bars with raised_amount from API (e.g., '₹0 raised', '₹499 raised'). 10) Admin Dashboard Settings tab has Social Media Links section with Facebook/Instagram/YouTube URL inputs and Save button. 11) Donate page loads correctly with QR code and donation form.
